zh.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德奧斯特賀內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy於1255年出生在盧森堡盧布格時，她的父親Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I32歲，母親Mathilde De Clèves30歲。她於大約1275年與Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年9月26日享年73歲。

zh-hans.Oostvoorne, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德奧斯特賀內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy于1255年出生在卢森堡盧布格时，她的父亲Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I32岁，母亲Mathilde De Clèves30岁。她于大约1275年与Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年9月26日享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Catharina
meanings: English: An English form of Catharine.

en.lifeSummary: When Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy was born in 1255, in Luxembourg, Luxembourg, her father, Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I, was 32 and her mother, Mathilde De Clèves, was 30. She married Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland about 1275. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 26 September 1328, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy est née en 1255, à Luxembourg, Luxembourg, son père, Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Clèves, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland environ 1275. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 septembre 1328, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy 1255 in Luxembourg, Luxemburg geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I 32 und ihre Mutter Mathilde De Clèves 30. Sie hat um 1275 Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. September 1328 im Alter von 73 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy è nata il nel 1255 nel Luxembourg, Lussemburgo, sua padre, Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mathilde De Clèves, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland circa 1275. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 settembre 1328, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catharina van Limburg van Durbuyが1255年にルクセンブルクルクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg Iは32歳，母Mathilde De Clèvesは30歳であった。約1275年にAlbrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年9月26日に73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy(이)가 1255년 룩셈부르크 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde De Clèves(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1275년 Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 9월 26일 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy nasceu em 1255, em Luxembourg, Luxemburgo, seu pai, Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Clèves, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland aproximadamente 1275. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1328, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy родилась в 1255 г. в местности луксембург, Люксембург, её отцу по имени Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Clèves, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland около 1275 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 26 сентября 1328 г. в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catharina van Limburg van Durbuy nació en 1255, en Luxembourg, Luxemburgo, su papá, Gerard de Limbourg de Luxembourg I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Clèves, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Albrecht heer van Voorne burggraaf van Zeeland aproximadamente 1275. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1328, a la edad de 73 años.
